decision: Chunk A — Make the Convergence page work. Photos first, side-by-side demo.
name: Convergence Page — Make It Work

steps.title: Power map Photos via API — dogfood write endpoints
Migration fidelity gate — content-level completeness check
Wire page from API — data is complete and verified
Deprecate HTML — Jeff eye test passes on Photos, then sweep remaining 3

demo.gate: Jeff picks a domain, expands both tabs. Content matches, mapping lines draw, severity badges correct, coverage %s real.
demo.sequence: Photos first (richest). If passes → sweep Stories, People, Social.
demo.acceptance: If Jeff can't tell the difference, we ship.

history.event: Step 2 (#1545) completed. Fidelity gate built — --verify flag, 7/7 pass, 3 parser bugs fixed. Waiting on step 0 (#1549) for step 1 to unblock.
